Off Calendar Apr-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert P. Garcia, Esq. 648-3060 for pltf & opposing party; Rudolph E. Vasquez, Esq. 362-3712 for deft & moving party Marlene Escobar.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Each to submit proposed orders with two page letters.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Continued To Apr-08-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Rudolph F. Vasquez, Esq. 362-3712 for deft & moving Marlene Esobar; no other appearances.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustains the demurrer with leave to amend. Deft to prepare order.

Demurrer-Amd Complt
Off Calendar Oct-24-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert P. Garcia, Esq. 648-3060 for pltf & opposing party; Mark Vasquez, Esq. 362-3712 for deft & moving party Marlene Escobar.
RULING: The Court sustains the demurrer with leave to amend to plead the circumstances of his discovery and explain why statute of limitations did not begin to run on 10/21/93. Order signed in open court. Court reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193.
